title: Anthropic’s safety warnings may have just backfired — the government has pulled the plug on its most powerful AI
summary: Anthropic isn't hiding its frustration. "We disagree that the finding of a narrow potential jailbreak should be cause for recalling a commercial model deployed to hundreds of millions of people," the company wrote in a blog post.
title_es: Gobierno ordena a Anthropic desactivar modelos Fable 5 y Mythos 5
bajada: El gobierno estadounidense ordenó a Anthropic bloquear el acceso a sus modelos más potentes debido a preocupaciones de seguridad nacional tras descubrirse un posible método de jailbreak. La compañía expresó su desacuerdo con la decisión, argumentando que un fallo específico no justifica retirar un modelo comercial usado por millones.
bajada_en: The US government ordered Anthropic to block access to its most powerful models due to national security concerns after discovering a potential jailbreak method. The company disagreed with the decision, arguing that a specific vulnerability doesn't justify recalling a commercial model used by millions.

title: Anthropic cuts off Fable 5 and Mythos 5 access following government order
summary: On Friday evening, the government ordered Anthropic to block access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 for all foreign nations, both inside and outside the US, due to national security concerns. That order included employees of Anthropic. To meet those demands, the company has completely cut off access to the models for all customers. In […]
title_es: Corte falla que Google es responsable de información falsa en AI Overviews
bajada: Un tribunal determinó que Google es legalmente responsable por las declaraciones falsas generadas por su sistema AI Overviews. La sentencia establece que las compañías que diseñan, entrenan y operan sistemas de IA deben asumir responsabilidad legal por los daños causados por sus respuestas.
bajada_en: A court ruled that Google is legally liable for false statements generated by its AI Overviews system. The ruling establishes that companies designing, training, and operating AI systems must assume legal responsibility for damages caused by their responses.

title: Anthropic Says It’s Taking Claude Fable 5 Offline to Comply With US Government Order
summary: “The government believes it has become aware of a method of bypassing, or ‘jailbreaking’ Fable 5,” the company said in a blog post.
title_es: NVIDIA Blackwell lidera benchmark de IA agéntica
bajada: NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra NVL72 demuestra rendimiento superior en AgentPerf, el primer benchmark de IA agéntica de la industria. La plataforma ejecuta 20x más agentes por megavatio que soluciones anteriores, estableciendo nuevos estándares para infraestructura de IA agéntica.
bajada_en: NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra NVL72 demonstrates superior performance on AgentPerf, the industry's first agentic AI benchmark. The platform runs 20x more agents per megawatt than previous solutions, setting new standards for agentic AI infrastructure.

title: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work
summary: OpenAI introduces three Academy courses that help people build practical AI skills, create repeatable workflows, and apply agents in everyday work.
title_es: Google demanda operación cibercriminal china que usó IA para estafar
bajada: Google presentó una demanda contra "Outsider Enterprise", un grupo que utilizó IA para estafar a cientos de miles de víctimas mediante 2.5 millones de mensajes de texto en dos semanas. El caso evidencia el creciente uso malicioso de tecnologías de IA en fraudes a gran escala.
bajada_en: Google filed a lawsuit against "Outsider Enterprise", a group that used AI to scam hundreds of thousands of victims through 2.5 million text messages over two weeks. The case highlights growing malicious use of AI technologies in large-scale fraud.

title: Show HN: Paca – Lightweight Jira alternative for human-AI collaboration
summary: I built Paca out of pure passion—a free and lightweight Jira alternative written in Go where humans and AI agents work together as equal teammates to plan sprints and assign tasks to each other. It is fully customizable with custom views, fields, and a WASM-based plugin architecture. My team uses it daily for our own development, so it will be continuously maintained and completely free foreverComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48515385Points: 59# Comments: 23
title_es: Apple integra herramientas de edición de fotos con IA en iOS 27
bajada: iOS 27 introduce las primeras herramientas serias de edición de fotos basadas en IA en los dispositivos Apple. Aunque más conservadoras que competidores como Google Pixel, las nuevas funciones marcan un cambio significativo en la estrategia de IA de Apple.
bajada_en: iOS 27 introduces Apple's first serious AI-powered photo editing tools across its devices. While more conservative than competitors like Google Pixel, the new features mark a significant shift in Apple's AI strategy.

title: Open source AI must win
summary: Article URL:https://opensourceaimustwin.com/?share=v2Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48511908Points: 1202# Comments: 378
title_es: Siri mejora drásticamente con nueva versión de IA
bajada: Apple presenta una versión renovada de Siri con capacidades de IA significativamente mejoradas, dejando atrás años de limitaciones. El asistente ahora demuestra competencia útil en tareas que previamente fallaba consistentemente.
bajada_en: Apple presents a revamped version of Siri with significantly improved AI capabilities, moving past years of limitations. The assistant now demonstrates useful competence in tasks it previously struggled with consistently.

title: Apple’s new AI photo editing tools mostly work, for better and worse
summary: The most popular camera in the world just got its first set of serious AI photo editing features, and I don't think any of us are ready. As far as AI photo editing goes, the new features in iOS 27 are pretty tame compared to what you can do on, say, Google's Pixel phones. But […]
title_es: Apple’s new AI photo editing tools mostly work, for better and worse
bajada: The most popular camera in the world just got its first set of serious AI photo editing features, and I don't think any of us are ready. As far as AI photo editing goes, the new features in iOS 27 are

summary: You'd be forgiven for thinking this day would never come. Siri has spent a decade and half somewhere between "sort of useful at a few things" and "utterly disastrous, why did I even try, can it honestly not even set a timer." But the wildest thing just happened: Apple put out a new version of […]

title: My yard is dying, so I made an app for that
summary: When I returned to my computer five minutes after giving Gemini a lengthy prompt, I had two things: a functional app in a preview window, and a message about a bug. "~ Channel is unrecoverably broken and will be disposed!" Sounded bad! But right below it was a button to fix the bug. Pretty weird […]
title_es: My yard is dying, so I made an app for that
bajada: When I returned to my computer five minutes after giving Gemini a lengthy prompt, I had two things: a functional app in a preview window, and a message about a bug. "~ Channel is unrecoverably broken

title: A Court Has Ruled That Google Is Liable for False Statements Generated by AI Overviews
summary: The ruling holds that a company that designs, trains, operates, and manages an AI system must assume legal liability for any damages caused by the responses it generates.
title_es: OpenAI lanza cursos para aplicar IA en el trabajo
bajada: OpenAI presenta tres nuevos cursos enfocados en enseñar habilidades prácticas de IA, crear workflows repetibles y aplicar agentes en tareas cotidianas. Los cursos buscan democratizar el conocimiento sobre implementación de IA en contextos empresariales.
bajada_en: OpenAI introduces three new courses focused on teaching practical AI skills, creating repeatable workflows, and applying agents to everyday work. The courses aim to democratize knowledge about implementing AI in business contexts.

title: NVIDIA Blackwell Leads on First Agentic AI Infrastructure Benchmark
summary: AgentPerf from Artificial Analysis, the industry’s first agentic AI benchmark, gives developers, enterprises and infrastructure providers a clear way to compare systems for agentic AI. In the first round of published results, the NVIDIA Blackwell Ultra NVL72 platform delivers leading performance across the agentic AI workloads tested, running 20x more agents per megawatt than NVIDIA […]
title_es: Allen AI libera olmo-eval para evaluación de modelos
bajada: Hugging Face y Allen AI presentan olmo-eval, un workbench de evaluación diseñado para optimizar el loop de desarrollo de modelos de IA. La herramienta facilita pruebas y validación iterativa en el proceso de entrenamiento.
bajada_en: Hugging Face and Allen AI present olmo-eval, an evaluation workbench designed to optimize the AI model development loop. The tool facilitates testing and iterative validation during training processes.

title: olmo-eval: An evaluation workbench for the model development loop
title_es: TensorZero archiva repositorio tras recaudar $7.3M
bajada: El proyecto TensorZero fue archivado sorpresivamente tras completar una ronda de inversión semilla de $7.3 millones. El movimiento generó especulación sobre cambios estratégicos o pivotes en la dirección del proyecto.
bajada_en: The TensorZero project was unexpectedly archived after completing a $7.3M seed funding round. The move sparked speculation about strategic changes or pivots in the project's direction.

title: Chinese cybercrime operation that used AI to scam ‘hundreds of thousands of victims’ sued by Google
summary: The tech giant said a group called "Outsider Enterprise" used AI to scam hundreds of thousands of victims, sending 2.5 million text messages over a span of two weeks.
title_es: Paca: alternativa lightweight a Jira con colaboración IA-humana
bajada: Un desarrollador lanzó Paca, una alternativa gratuita y ligera a Jira escrita en Go, diseñada para que humanos e IA trabajen juntos en planificación de sprints. La herramienta utiliza arquitectura WASM para plugins completamente personalizables.
bajada_en: A developer launched Paca, a free lightweight Jira alternative written in Go, designed for humans and AI to work together on sprint planning. The tool uses WASM architecture for fully customizable plugins.

title: AI OSS tool repo goes archived over night after raising $7.3M Seed
summary: Article URL:https://github.com/tensorzero/tensorzeroComments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48516504Points: 53# Comments: 24
title_es: Manifiesto: el open source de IA debe ganar
bajada: Un manifiesto llamado "Open Source AI Must Win" genera amplio debate en la comunidad desarrolladora sobre la importancia de mantener IA open-source. El texto aborda preocupaciones sobre concentración de poder en modelos propietarios.
bajada_en: A manifesto titled "Open Source AI Must Win" generates widespread debate in the developer community about the importance of maintaining open-source AI. The text addresses concerns about power concentration in proprietary models.

title: Amazon CEO reportedly raised Anthropic model concerns before government crackdown
summary: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy may have been the source of security concerns that led Anthropic to cut off worldwide access to two models on Friday.
title_es: Amazon alertó a gobierno sobre seguridad de modelos Anthropic
bajada: Según reportes, el CEO de Amazon Andy Jassy reportó preocupaciones de seguridad que llevaron al gobierno a bloquear los modelos Fable 5 y Mythos 5 de Anthropic. La investigación de ciberseguridad de Amazon fue clave en la decisión regulatoria.
bajada_en: Amazon CEO Andy Jassy reportedly flagged security concerns that led the government to block Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models. Amazon's cybersecurity research was key in the regulatory decision.

title: OpenAI faces investigation from state attorneys general
summary: It's not clear which states are involved, but they're asking about everything from OpenAI's ad policies to its handling of health data.
title_es: OpenAI bajo investigación de fiscales estatales de EE.UU.
bajada: Varios estados están investigando a OpenAI por políticas publicitarias y manejo de datos de salud. Las investigaciones reflejan creciente escrutinio regulatorio sobre prácticas de compañías de IA.
bajada_en: Multiple U.S. states are investigating OpenAI over advertising policies and health data handling. The investigations reflect growing regulatory scrutiny on AI company practices.

title: KPMG pulls report on AI usage due to apparent hallucinations
summary: Once again, AI proves to be an unreliable source of information about AI.
title_es: KPMG retira reporte sobre IA por alucinaciones detectadas
bajada: KPMG tuvo que retirar un informe sobre uso de IA tras descubrir que contenía información fabricada por los modelos. El incidente subraya la importancia crítica de validar outputs de IA antes de publicar.
bajada_en: KPMG had to withdraw a report on AI usage after discovering it contained hallucinated information generated by AI models. The incident underscores the critical importance of validating AI outputs before publication.

title: Amazon security research reportedly led to the White House’s Anthropic Fable ban
summary: According to the Wall Street Journal, the export control directive that led to Anthropic cutting off access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 was triggered in part by cybersecurity research from Amazon and conversations between CEO Andy Jassy and the White House. According to the report, the paper from Amazon claims that, through a series […]
title_es: Investigación de Amazon disparó restricciones de modelos Anthropic
bajada: Una investigación de ciberseguridad de Amazon, comunicada a la Casa Blanca, fue determinante en la orden ejecutiva que bloqueó el acceso a Fable 5 y Mythos 5. El caso ilustra cómo investigaciones privadas pueden influir en regulación pública.
bajada_en: Amazon's cybersecurity research, communicated to the White House, was decisive in the executive order blocking access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5. The case shows how private research can influence public regulation.

title: Police officer investigated for using AI to 'create evidence' in multiple cases
summary: Article URL:https://news.sky.com/story/derbyshire-police-officer-investigated-for-using-ai-to-create-evidence-in-multiple-cases-13553661Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48520807Points: 116# Comments: 40
title_es: Policía investigado por usar IA para fabricar evidencia
bajada: Un oficial de policía en Derbyshire fue investigado por usar IA para crear evidencia en múltiples casos. El escándalo revela riesgos críticos de implementar IA sin controles adecuados en aplicaciones legales.
bajada_en: A police officer in Derbyshire is under investigation for using AI to fabricate evidence in multiple cases. The scandal reveals critical risks of deploying AI without proper controls in legal applications.

title: PwC Report: AI Making Medical Bills Higher
summary: Article URL:https://fortune.com/2026/06/12/ai-making-medical-bills-higher/Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48519519Points: 61# Comments: 14
title_es: Reportes advierten que IA está aumentando costos médicos
bajada: Análisis de PwC y Fortune muestran que implementaciones de IA en salud están elevando facturas médicas en lugar de reducirlas. El hallazgo cuestiona narrativas de ahorro de costos en adopción de IA healthcare.
bajada_en: PwC and Fortune analysis shows AI implementations in healthcare are raising medical bills instead of lowering them. The finding questions cost-saving narratives in AI healthcare adoption.

title: AI coding at home without going broke
summary: Article URL:https://stephen.bochinski.dev/blog/2026/06/13/ai-coding-at-home-without-going-broke/Comments URL:https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48518969Points: 197# Comments: 178
title_es: Guía para programar con IA sin gastos excesivos
bajada: Un desarrollador comparte estrategias para usar IA en programación local sin incurrir en costos prohibitivos de APIs. El post genera interés en comunidades por alternativas de bajo costo para IA en desarrollo.
bajada_en: A developer shares strategies for using AI in local coding without incurring prohibitive API costs. The post sparks community interest in low-cost AI alternatives for development.

title: I’m building a free bilingual machine-learning notebook course — looking for feedback on structure and coverage [R]
summary: Hi everyone,I’m building an open-source machine-learning tutorial repository in Jupyter Notebook format:https://github.com/mohammadijoo/Machine_Learning_TutorialsThe course is bilingual: English and Persian/Farsi versions are organized in parallel. The goal is to make a practical, notebook-first ML curriculum that students can run locally and study step by step.Current focus areas include:ML foundations and workflowdata cleaning, preprocessing, feature engineeringregression and classificationtree models and ensemblesclustering and dimensionality reductionevaluation, cross-validation, calibrationtime series, anomaly detection, responsible ML, and MLOps conceptsdatasets and exercises for hands-on practiceI would appreciate feedback on:whether the chapter order makes sense for beginnerswhat important classical ML topics are missingwhether bilingual notebooks are useful for non-native English learnershow to make the notebooks more practical without turning them into only “copy/paste code”I’m sharing this as a free educational resource and would value constructive criticism.submitted by/u/abolfazl1363[link][comments]
title_es: Curso abierto bilingüe de Machine Learning en Jupyter
bajada: Un desarrollador lanza un repositorio educativo de ML gratuito y open-source con notebooks en inglés y farsi. El proyecto busca hacer ML más accesible para estudiantes no angloparlantes a través de formato bilingüe.
bajada_en: A developer launches a free, open-source ML educational repository with notebooks in English and Farsi. The project aims to make ML more accessible to non-English-speaking students through bilingual content.
